commit.message:
Implement theme system (Light / Dark / System default)

Wires the existing Settings > Theme dropdown to actual visual changes:
- Four CoffeeSettings colour accessors (ThemePanelBg, ThemeTextColor,
  ThemeDimTextColor, ThemeOutlineColor) return palette values per theme
- SyncAllWindows() broadcasts MSG_THEME_CHANGED to all open windows
- Custom Draw() methods (ParticleGaugeView, SieveDistView, CalHistView,
  ExtractionBarView, RoastGaugeView, ThumbView) use theme colours for
  backgrounds, outlines, tick marks, and labels
- BTextView tips areas update view/text colour on MSG_THEME_CHANGED and
  in constructors so newly opened windows inherit the active theme
- Coffee-colour gradients and extraction zone colours are unchanged

commit.message:
feat: dynamic pill count in search bar via ResizeObserver

Uses ResizeObserver on the search-bar element to measure available
width, then estimates how many pills fit using Courier New's fixed
character width. maxPills updates on every resize so pills fill the
bar on wide screens and collapse to +N on narrow ones.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Ed25519 auth middleware (#8) (#19)

* Add Ed25519 request signing and verification

- Ed25519 signature verification as FastAPI dependency (require_auth)
- Signing protocol: METHOD\nPATH\nTIMESTAMP\nSHA256(BODY)
- Timestamp validation with ±5 minute replay window
- Authorization header parsing (Signature agent_id:base64_sig)
- Abstract agent lookup protocol for database independence
- sign_request() test utility for integration test signing
- Unprotected paths bypass: /, /manifest, /agents/register, /health

Implements: nexus-marbell/fleet-api#8

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix PR #19 review blockers: query string signing, unprotected paths, error codes

Blocker 1: Signing string now includes query string per RFC §4.2.
Previously request.url.path stripped query params, allowing MITM to
rewrite query parameters without invalidating the signature. Fixed in
both build_signing_string() call site and sign_request() test helper.

Blocker 2: Added /errors and /openapi.json to UNPROTECTED_PATHS per
RFC §4.4. Documented /agents/register bootstrap paradox decision and
root path inclusion with comments.

Blocker 3: Missing X-Fleet-Timestamp now returns INVALID_SIGNATURE
instead of TIMESTAMP_EXPIRED. Missing header is a malformed request,
not an expired timestamp. TIMESTAMP_EXPIRED reserved for timestamps
that parse but fall outside the replay window.

Minor 1: Added docstring explaining PEM bytes return value purpose
in generate_test_keypair() (needed for future /agents/register tests).

Minor 2: PlaceholderAgentLookup NotImplementedError now caught in
require_auth, returns 503 SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE instead of unhandled 500.

Minor 3: Added query string signing tests — 4 integration tests
(valid signing, altered params, added params, removed params) and
3 unit tests (path with query, different queries, tampering).

42 auth tests pass (up from 31).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Pivot to SCAIL pose-based character animation workflow

Replace Wan2.2 Animate + ReActor face swap approach with SCAIL
(Studio-grade Character Animation via In-Context Learning) which uses
3D-consistent pose representation with native identity preservation.

- provisioning.sh: 10 nodes → 8 (5 SCAIL core + 3 post-processing)
- Models: Wan2_2-Animate-14B → Wan21-14B-SCAIL-preview (FP8)
- Remove: ReActor, DWPose, Impact-Pack, SAM2 (not needed for SCAIL)
- Add: ComfyUI-SCAIL-Pose, ComfyUI-WanAnimatePreprocess
- workflows: replace 3 untested templates with production SCAIL workflow
- Update all docs to reflect SCAIL architecture

commit.message:
feat: MLX backend for GPU execution of EmojiASM programs (#21)

Add full MLX Metal compute kernel dispatch to emojiasm/gpu.py:
- gpu_available() for safe MLX/Metal availability detection
- gpu_run() dispatches programs via mx.fast.metal_kernel()
- run_auto() auto-selects GPU (n>=256, tier<=2) or CPU fallback
- _stats() helper for result statistics
- _split_kernel_source() adapts vm.metal for MLX's metal_kernel API

CLI integration (--gpu, --gpu-instances N) in __main__.py.
Test suite in tests/test_mlx_backend.py with 10 tests covering both
GPU-optional and non-GPU paths.

commit.message:
Add company name normalizer and Smart Dedup feature

12-stage normalization pipeline adapted from OpenCode research:
- Unicode NFKC, CRN code removal, legal suffix stripping (Ltd/Limited/LLC/Inc/Corp/GmbH)
- Symbol mapping (& → and), tokenization, stopword removal, canonical form, Soundex phonetic hash
- New /api/enrich/normalized-duplicates/<table> endpoint with suffix-stripped, canonical, and phonetic matching
- Enhanced cross-module dedup (leads ↔ accounts) now catches suffix variants (e.g. "Kiely Planning" = "Kiely Planning Limited")
- "Smart Dedup" button in Enrich tab UI with cluster display and merge action

commit.message:
Paper revision R1: implement 14 changes from simulated peer review + writing analysis

Revision round 1 (simulated peer review by R1: Methodologist + R2: Theorist):
- Ground all 5 design principles in theory (Parnas, Flower & Hayes, Swales, Hyland, Vygotsky, Denzin)
- Add structured validity discussion (internal, construct, external, conclusion)
- Add academic writing process literature to Related Work
- Anchor evaluation criteria in Hevner (2004), Webster & Watson (2002), Swales (1990)
- Address version mismatch (v5.3/5.4 vs v6.0.0 evaluation scope)
- Clarify contribution framing + add transferability examples
- Expand publisher/reviewer implications
- 6 new references, paper grows from 17 to 19 pages

New artifacts:
- outputs/revision_log_r1.md, revision_letter.md, orchestration_log.md
- simulated_reviews.md (2 reviewer reports + meta-reviewer)
- writing_analysis.md (8-metric style analysis)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: implement full custom role permissions system

Replace hardcoded Owner/Admin checks with a real permission system:

Backend:
- Add isAuthorized(serverId, userId, permission) helper in servers.ts
  that checks Owner/Admin OR custom role grants that permission
- Add hasServerPermission() equivalent in channels.ts
- GET /servers/:id now returns my_permissions[] (combined from all roles)
- Route guards now use specific permissions per action:
  - manage_server: PUT /servers/:id
  - manage_roles: POST/PUT/DELETE roles, PUT member roles
  - kick_members: DELETE /servers/:id/members/:userId
  - manage_channels: all channel and category CRUD
- Emit permissions_updated to user:{id} when their roles are changed

Frontend:
- Add my_permissions?: string[] to ServerFull interface
- Compute per-feature flags: canManageChannels, canManageRoles,
  canKickMembers, canManageServer, canManageMessages, canSendMessages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use chroma flatness instead of energy for noise detection

Previous approach only detected silence (low energy). In a session,
ambient noise has plenty of energy but is spread evenly across all
chroma bins. Now uses spectral flatness (geometric/arithmetic mean
ratio) to distinguish melodic content (peaky, 1-3 dominant bins)
from noise (flat, energy spread across all 12 bins).

Frames with flatness > 0.45 OR energy < 0.05 are marked as noise.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(pwa): service worker update strategy — auto-reload on new deploy

Root causes identified:
1. sw.js was matched by the Nginx `~* \.(js|...)$` regex and served with
   Cache-Control: public, immutable (1 year). Browsers never re-fetched
   sw.js after a deploy, so the SW could never update itself.

2. skipWaiting() was already in place but there was no client-reload signal.
   When the new SW activated and called clients.claim(), old clients kept
   running stale JS that referenced old chunk URLs (now 404 on server) →
   React.lazy threw ChunkLoadError → ErrorBoundary showed crash screen.

Fixes:
- nginx: add location = /sw.js with no-cache, no-store before the JS regex
  rule (exact match takes priority). Same for /index.html. Applied to both
  production and staging server blocks.
- sw.js: bump VERSION 3.0.0 → 3.1.0 (forces old cache cleanup on activate).
  After clients.claim(), postMessage SW_UPDATED to all window clients.
- main.tsx: listen for SW_UPDATED message + controllerchange event. Both
  trigger scheduleReload() (once per tab, 200ms delay, hadController guard
  prevents spurious reload on first-ever SW install).

Result: after any future deploy, open tabs automatically reload within
~200ms of the new SW activating, picking up the new index.html and
content-hashed chunk URLs. No more ChunkLoadError on stale bundles.

commit.message:
Migrate from redb to SQLite for all persistent storage (#34)

Replace redb key-value store with rusqlite (SQLite) across all 7 store
files. All 11 redb tables are now proper SQL tables with typed columns,
queryable via standard SQL tooling (sqlite3 CLI, DB browsers).

Key changes:
- New storage/db.rs: shared Db wrapper with Mutex<Connection>, WAL mode,
  single migration function for all tables
- model_registry: SQL columns, dedup by name via DELETE+INSERT
- catalog: flat fields as SQL columns, chunks/version/conflicts as JSON
- trust: TrustSource as text enum, no more TrustRecord serde struct
- chat: proper timestamp indexing, ORDER BY instead of in-memory sort
- volume: SQL columns, removed serde from VolumeRecord
- placement: SQL columns for shard tracking
- crypto_meta: simple key-value SQL table

Also includes: model registry bug fixes (dedup, clear_models command),
ModelRegistryPanel fixes from previous session, bump to v0.1.29.

Removes redb dependency entirely. Retains postcard for network wire
protocol serialization only.

commit.message:
fix: repair music on IG reels and boost YouTube audio volume

Instagram: Patched instagrapi's search_music() to handle None items
in API response (Instagram changed response format, causing
'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get' errors). All 5 music
queries were returning 200 OK but parsing crashed → reels published
silently. Now filters None tracks and retries up to 8 queries.

YouTube: Boosted lo-fi beat volume ~2.5x (was barely audible).
Added loudnorm normalization to -16 LUFS (YouTube broadcast standard).
Removed broken Pixabay Music API (doesn't exist — only images/videos).
Replaced with extensible MUSIC_API_URL env var for external music.
